theme_and_archetype.theme: Light (with one specific Dark emotional impact screen)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Apple + Airbnb + Notion + LinkedIn. Clean, premium, modern, minimal, emotional, trustworthy, highly polished.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-semibold shadow-soft
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-gray-200 rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-semibold shadow-sm

cards.pillar: p-6 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between h-40 shadow-soft
cards.mentor: bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-soft flex flex-col gap-3 border border-gray-100
cards.resource: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-soft overflow-hidden w-48 border border-gray-100

chips.category: px-5 h-9 rounded-full bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-medium text-gray-800 whitespace-nowrap
chips.achievement: px-3 py-1 rounded-md bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 text-xs font-bold border border-amber-100

tabs.bottom_nav: bg-white border-t border-gray-100 pb-safe pt-3 flex justify-around shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.03)]

onboarding.layout: Full-screen high-quality illustration, absolute positioned bottom sheet container (bg-white, rounded-t-3xl) with H1, description, dots pagination. Primary CTA 'Continue' filling width.

home.layout: px-6 pt-12 pb-24. Header with Greeting + Profile Avatar. Search bar. 2x2 Grid for 4 Pillars (Learn, Vault, Career, Community). Banner 'Become a Mentor'. Horizontal scroll for Featured Mentors. Horizontal scroll for Upcoming Workshops. Mini visual for Student Journey.

learn_mentor_discovery.layout: px-6 pt-12 pb-24. Search bar. Horizontal Category Chips (single horizontal scroller, chip 36pt height, row 56pt). Vertical list of Mentor Cards (Image left, details right, price and 'Book' button bottom).

mentor_profile.layout: Large hero image. Floating back button (glassmorphism). Bottom sheet overlapping image (rounded-t-3xl, -mt-8): Name, Verified badge, Achievement Chips. Bio text. Subjects list. Reviews horizontal scroll. Sticky bottom CTA container 'Book Session - $XX'.

book_session.layout: px-6 pt-12 pb-32. Calendar date picker (horizontal scroll). Time slots (grid of chips). Session type toggle. Payment summary card. Sticky bottom CTA 'Confirm Booking'.

legacy_vault.layout: pt-12 pb-24. Header px-6. Netflix-style layout: Vertical ScrollView containing multiple horizontal ScrollViews. Categories: Winning Presentations, Debate Speeches, Notes. Resource cards: Cover image, title, author, rating.

career_compass.layout: px-6 pt-12 pb-24. Grid layout of Career paths. Clicking one opens a detail view with roadmap and AI Q&A chat interface.

community.layout: px-6 pt-12 pb-24. Segmented control (Workshops, Hackathons, Discussions). Vertical feed of event cards.

profile.layout: px-6 pt-12 pb-24. User info header. 'My Learning Journey' stats row (Sessions, Resources, Followers). List of menu items: My Bookings, Saved Resources, Vault Contributions, Achievements, Settings.

impact_screen.layout: Dark mode (bg-[#0A0F24]). Centered glowing tree illustration. 'You Left a Legacy' H1 in white. Stats grid (Mentored, Resources, Won, Impacted). Subtle glow effects and particle animations.

mentors.description: Professional male college student mentor in blue shirt

community_banners.description: Group of students working together on a laptop

impact_screen.description: Glowing blue magical tree abstract dark

animation_and_motion.page_transitions: Smooth slide-up from bottom for full-screen modals (Book Session). Horizontal slide for standard navigation.
animation_and_motion.interactions: Scale down slightly on button press (0.95 active state). Soft fade-in for images.
animation_and_motion.success: Lottie animation (check mark + confetti) on successful booking or resource upload.

testing.requirements: All interactive components must have data-testid attributes.
